questions.question: What scaled score is needed to pass the SAA-C03 exam?
questions.feedback: The exam is scored on a 100-1000 scale and you need 720 to pass.

questions.question: Which domain carries the largest weighting?
questions.feedback: Security is the heaviest domain at 30%, so it deserves the most study time.

questions.question: On a multiple-response question where two answers are correct, you select one correct and one incorrect answer. What do you score?

answers.text: Nothing - there is no partial credit
Full marks, because you got one right

questions.feedback: Multiple-response questions require every correct answer and no incorrect ones; there is no partial credit.

questions.question: Which of these are pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework?
questions.feedback: The pillars are Operational Excellence, Security, Reliability, Performance Efficiency, Cost Optimization, and Sustainability.
